summary: Backend join-window expansion to [start-30min, end] is correct and fully covered: 6/6 new boundary tests (T-35, T-30, at-start, at-end, T+1, recently-ended) pass on /api/interviews/my-bookings for both student and pro POV; 11/11 iter37+iter38 regression tests still pass. Frontend: layout, opacity dim, pill colour ('Ready' green / 'Booked' purple) and join button rendering all behave per spec on both /student/my-mock-interviews and /professional/my-mock-interviews at 414x896. HOWEVER, the spec-mandated popup ('You can join the interview only within 30 minutes of the scheduled interview time.') NEVER fires on the web preview because react-native-web 0.21.0 ships Alert as a stub (static alert() {}). On native iOS/Android the code is correct, but on the web preview the tap on a >30-min-away Join button is silently swallowed — no popup, no nav, no console log. NEAR (within-window) tap is consumed correctly (no premature popup). Both Student and Pro web flows exhibit the same Alert no-op bug.

ui_bugs.issue: Alert.alert('Not yet available', '...within 30 minutes...') is a complete no-op on react-native-web@0.21.0 (see node_modules/react-native-web/dist/exports/Alert/index.js — `static alert() {}`). Tapping Join >30min before the slot on the web preview shows nothing, navigates nowhere, prints nothing. Spec requires the exact wording to appear. Needs a Platform.OS==='web' branch that calls window.alert(msg) (or a custom in-app Modal) so the message surfaces on web. testID='join-{id}' on the FAR card was clicked, click landed (dim opacity 0.65 visible), but onPress handler's Alert produced no UI. Reference: /app/frontend/app/student/my-mock-interviews.tsx:115-120
Same Alert.alert no-op as student side — pro tapping Join on a >30-min-away booking sees nothing on the web preview. Reference: /app/frontend/app/professional/my-mock-interviews.tsx:86-92

issues: Visual gating works as intended: 'Ready' green pill + full-opacity Join for within-window slot; 'Booked' purple pill + opacity 0.65 Join for >30min-away slot (verified at 414x896 — screenshots /tmp/iter39_student_list.png, /tmp/iter39_pro_list.png).
No premature-popup regression on the within-window slot for either role.

react_native_issues.issue: react-native-web 0.21.0 stubs Alert.alert to a no-op, so any Alert.alert(...) call across the app is silently dropped on the web preview. The Join-window popup, plus any other Alert-based confirmation in the codebase, will not appear on web. Recommendation: introduce a shared `notify(title, message)` helper using Platform.select({ web: () => window.alert(`${title}\n\n${message}`), default: () => Alert.alert(title, message) }). Reference: /app/frontend/node_modules/react-native-web/dist/exports/Alert/index.js

action_items: Replace Alert.alert in /app/frontend/app/student/my-mock-interviews.tsx (line 116) and /app/frontend/app/professional/my-mock-interviews.tsx (line 87) with a Platform-aware notify helper that falls back to window.alert on web, so the exact spec message surfaces on the web preview. Without this, the popup acceptance criterion fails on web.
Optional sweep: audit other Alert.alert call sites in /app/frontend/app for the same web no-op (e.g. payment errors, booking errors).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/interviews/my-bookings join_enabled computation is correct and aligned with the spec (window_start = start - 30min, window_end = end_at, inclusive).
Backend response correctly strips internal joined_by + exposes slot_ended/both_joined/join_enabled — iter37/iter38 contracts preserved.

success_rate.frontend: 50% (visual + within-window OK on both roles; >30min-away popup BROKEN on web for both roles due to RNW Alert no-op)

seed_data_creation: Created /app/test_reports/seed_iter39_ui.py which signs up a fresh student + pro and seeds 2 booked interview_slots (`far` = now+2h..+2h30m, `near` = now+10..+40m). Slots tagged _test_marker='iter39_ui' for future cleanup. Output: /tmp/iter39_seed.json.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend logic verified correct — DO NOT re-test boundaries unless interviews.py changes. The remaining open item is purely frontend: Alert.alert on web. After main agent fixes the popup to use window.alert/Platform.select on web, re-run /app/test_reports/seed_iter39_ui.py and use page.on('dialog', ...) — once the fix lands the FAR-slot tap will surface a window.alert dialog containing exactly 'You can join the interview only within 30 minutes of the scheduled interview time.'
rca_of_issue: Root cause: react-native-web@0.21.0 implements Alert as `class Alert { static alert() {} }` (literal empty function — verified by reading /app/frontend/node_modules/react-native-web/dist/exports/Alert/index.js). Therefore every Alert.alert(...) call from app code is a no-op on the web preview. Reproduction: (1) `python /app/test_reports/seed_iter39_ui.py` to provision users + far/near slots; (2) login as the seeded student at http://localhost:3000/login; (3) navigate to /student/my-mock-interviews; (4) tap testID=join-{far_id} — observe no dialog, no native window.confirm/alert, no console log, URL unchanged. Backend GET /api/interviews/my-bookings already returns join_enabled=false for that booking so the gating decision is right; the gap is purely the UI feedback. Mitigation: route the user-facing message through a platform-aware helper (Platform.OS==='web' ? window.alert(...) : Alert.alert(...)) or a Modal.
